codeReview.summary: The implementation correctly fixes the SSE parser bug where StreamEvent::Usage was not emitted when cache tokens were present without output_tokens. The fix broadens the condition from `if u.output_tokens.is_some()` to `if u.output_tokens.is_some() || u.cache_creation_input_tokens.is_some() || u.cache_read_input_tokens.is_some()`, ensuring Usage events are emitted whenever any token data is present. The StreamEvent::Usage type already had proper fields for cache tokens (cache_creation_input_tokens and cache_read_input_tokens as Option<u64>), so no new event type was needed. 4 tests verify the behavior including JSON serialization for machine-parseability.

summary: Implementation passes review. Fixed SSE parser condition to emit Usage events when cache tokens are present (even without output_tokens). Added 4 tests covering cache token event emission and JSON serialization. No bugs or edge cases identified.
